name: @shamu/protocol-a2a
description: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) v1.0 server + client library for Shamu. Signed Agent Cards (Ed25519), JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP (POST) + SSE (streaming), and bearer-token auth rooted in the card's issuer DID. Sibling to @shamu/protocol-acp. Self-contained; the supervisor/mailbox wiring lands in a follow-on Phase 8 track.
